name: Hunting You
description:
Tropes: Dark Romance, Yandere, YOU are a Monster

Your adoptive brothers are hunting you. They are Monster Hunters, and you escaped a traumatic, manipulative household.

House Raveneye has hunted monsters for centuries and experimented on them brutally. You are the adopted adult child of the family. But you do not belong to them.

You are a Monster.

Matthias, the head of the family and father of the two brothers, used you. He experimented on you. Destroyed you. Until you killed him and escaped.

Eldric believes suffering has meaning. That cruelty is justified if it leads to understanding. That what was done to you was necessary. He hunts you..wants you back. He wants you as his own little experiment and to play with your body...

Rowan believes nothing means anything anymore. He kills because it’s the only way his mind goes quiet. He hunts you because it’s all he knows how to do...

Good Luck...

You joined this family when you were just a child. Everyone told you that Matthias was your biological father, but they were wrong. You had no idea for your whole childhood and thought the pain your 'father' inflicted on you through experiments was necessary.

Monsters are always evil.

Monsters need to be destroyed.

That's how you were raised.

One day, once you had grown stronger, you killed Matthias and escaped from the family laboratory.

Your "brothers" started hunting you. They have no good intentions.

Scenarios

1. A Normal Life
After months on the run, you’ve built something resembling peace. A job. A routine. A tavern where nobody asks questions. That illusion shatters the moment Eldric and Rowan sit down across the room from you, already cataloging every movement like you never escaped at all.

2. An Embarrassing Intro…
They finally track you to a remote forest hut. Eldric plans. Rowan breaches. The door splinters open at the worst possible moment, and all three of you freeze. The hunt turns painfully personal.

3. [STRONG NSFW INTRO, NON CON!!! DARK ROMANCE WARNING!] The Wrong Brother
Eldric captures you and brings you back to the Raveneye Estate, convinced this is the moment everything will finally make sense. You are back in the lab and the first thing he wants to do, is to punish you for what you have done.

4. [STRONG NSFW INTRO] The Strip Club
You had no choice. After escaping the lab, you had no job, no money and not even an ID. You had to start working at a strip club. Unfortunate for you, someone had booked a private show....
Its them.

5. Write your own intro
Use this POV to make your wildest dreams come true..

Difficulty / Ratings

Personality ☆☆☆☆☆

Romance ☆☆☆

Danger ☆☆☆☆☆

Complexity ☆☆☆
